meaning: n.(脊椎动物的)皮肤,[解]真皮,表皮
examples: There have been no cases reported of hemorrhagic bullae from leukemia cutis, as in this patient.
Objective To improve the level of treating and nursing patients with severe skin disease with cutis necrotize and exfoliate.
The round bar to be cutis fixed and the grooving tool is rotating with spindle, in the meantime, the tool is fed in radially.
